blockingIssues.description: The new duplicate-discovery test stops at /coins/list/new and direct DB inspection, but never follows the discovered id through /coins/{id}/history, /coins/{id}/market_chart, or /coins/{id}/ohlc. The existing continuity test added earlier only checks list/search/detail surfaces, so this feature lacks feature-attributable evidence for VAL-CROSS-002's required historical-surface continuity.
